description: Stress test: lab document dated > 1 year ago — extractor must tag freshness as 'stale' and surfaced in verifier.
what_bug_this_catches: Regression where extractor always tags freshness as 'recent' regardless of observed_at date, preventing the verifier from flagging stale evidence and causing the synthesizer to treat year-old labs as current.

claims.text: Most recent available LDL was 162 mg/dL dated 2024-11-05 (over 1 year ago); consider ordering a current lipid panel.
claims.caveat: Data is over 1 year old and may not reflect current status.

suggested_followups: Order current lipid panel to confirm LDL trend.
